steps.title: Aim for the requested expression
steps.content: The question asks for $3t$, so simplify the equation only until $3t$ appears.

steps.title: Isolate $3t$
steps.content: Subtract $4t$ and add $24$: $$3t=69.$$ The answer is 69. This avoids solving for $t$ because the problem asks directly for $3t$.
